# ha-frontend 20260624.4 — LCARS Theme Impact Analysis

## Release Notes

- Allow negative number entry in number selector on iOS (@MindFreeze - #52925)
- Add My links for infrared and radio frequency config panels (@MindFreeze - #52931)
- Fix double bar in energy devices detail graph at start of day (@MindFreeze - #52939)
- Link the config pane help icon to the dedicated docs page (@frenck - #52940)
- Refresh the template tool documentation panel (@frenck - #52941)
- Fix My link for adding an add-on repository not doing anything (@MindFreeze - #52945)

---

## HIGH IMPACT

No high-impact breaking changes identified in this release.

## MEDIUM IMPACT

No medium-impact degraded appearance changes identified in this release.

## LOW IMPACT

### Component: Energy Chart — `energy-chart-options.ts` / `energy-devices-detail-graph-data.ts` / `energy-solar-graph-data.ts` / `hui-energy-usage-graph-card.ts`

**What changed:** A new exported utility function `getPeriodMidpointOffset(period: string)` was added to `energy-chart-options.ts` and imported into three energy graph components (`energy-devices-detail-graph-data.ts`, `energy-solar-graph-data.ts`, `hui-energy-usage-graph-card.ts`). The function computes a period-based midpoint offset (`PERIOD_MS[period] / 2`) for centering sub-daily bars and forecast lines on energy charts, replacing the previous heuristic that estimated midpoints from the gap between the first two data entries. This heuristic collapsed to zero when only a single bucket existed (e.g., the first bar of the day), causing the double-bar-at-start-of-day rendering bug. The fix makes the offset derivation data-independent.

**Visual effect:** Energy graph bars (`hui-energy-usage-graph-card`, `energy-devices-detail-graph-card`) and forecast lines (`energy-solar-graph-data`) for `hour` and `5minute` periods will now be horizontally centered correctly under all conditions, including when there is only one data bucket at the start of the day. This is a rendering correction, not a style regression.

**What specific ha-lcars CSS rule or variable it affects:** The ha-lcars theme does not currently inject any card-mod CSS targeting `hui-energy-usage-graph-card`, `energy-devices-detail-graph-card`, `energy-solar-graph-card`, or any internal ECharts canvas/SVG elements within these components. No LCARS CSS custom properties (`--lcars-*`, `--ha-*`, `--mdc-*`) are referenced or consumed by this change.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed. The theme does not style energy chart bar positioning. If a future theme version were to inject CSS targeting ECharts bar x-offset or transform properties within these shadow roots, the new `getPeriodMidpointOffset` behavior would be the correct baseline to design against.

---

*All four changed files relevant to styling in this release concern only the energy chart bar/forecast centering logic. No CSS custom properties were renamed or removed, no web component element names changed, no shadow DOM structure was altered, no new layout tokens were introduced, and no card background or text-color application changed. The ha-lcars theme requires no updates for this release.*
